items.name_cn:
STEAMER Series M81783 Uninspected Version#
▇ Size: 18*11*6.5cm ▇
A long-awaited Steamer series.
The bag size is designed just right, interpreting a style concept suitable for both men and women, full of vintage charm. The black Monogram is versatile and eye-catching, and the full leather corners add texture to the bag, creating an instant urge to buy.
The carrying effect is beyond imagination, I love it!
High capacity, a daily essential for going out, the ultimate style icon!

items.name_en: Still minimalist new bucket bag, featuring imported sheepskin drawstring paired with a signature logo. Large capacity design, combining aesthetics and practicality, very roomy. The smooth and glossy sheepskin surface feels premium. Comes with a detachable pouch inside, adjustable shoulder strap, easily switching between a crossbody or shoulder bag! Satisfies various daily occasions. Full of three-dimensional feel, perfectly interpreting understated and minimalist~

items.name_en: Style No.: CH194 Coach HANNA Series. Full of high-end feel and artisan details! Especially the side oil-edge pleated design gives the shape a gentle yet three-dimensional look. The capacity speaks for itself, continuing the traditional bucket bag's large capacity and functionality. Dual detachable shoulder straps, practical and versatile. Made of cowhide, full of temperament. Magnetic closure, convenient and secure. Especially suitable for elegant ladies.

items.name_cn:
Style No.6411.
✨MCM✨ This Dessau drawstring bag is named after a historically 📝 significant center for Bauhaus design. The bag features a classic style that integrates form and function, paying tribute to the famous art movement. The classic Visetos🌷 pattern combined with Nappa leather🐂 showcases the charm of traditional craftsmanship. Inside hides a detachable classic pattern clutch, which can be used as an independent 👝 wallet. The included leather handle and adjustable🐂 leather shoulder strap make this bag elegant and versatile. Dimensions: 26x22x13

items.name_en: Style No.666234 🏒MCM🏒 Original Patricia Crossbody Bag, made of classic Visetos, stylish and chic. The front flap laurel lock design showcases classic charm. Three internal compartments keep your items organized. Removable shoulder strap allows for both handbag and crossbody wear, freeing your hands. Dimensions: 12.5x18x9cm
